overview: Aegis is an agentic command center for startup founders that scans project data (Linear) to detect strategic risks and proposes interventions via an adversarial multi-agent debate pipeline.
target_audience: Founders, Product Leads, and Agentic Developers.

core_features.name: Signal Engine
core_features.description: Reads Linear data and detects drift indicators using heuristics.

core_features.name: Product Brain
core_features.description: Multi-agent LLM debate for risk synthesis (Cynic, Optimist, Strategist).

core_features.name: Coordinator
core_features.description: Selects optimal interventions from a predefined taxonomy.

core_features.name: Governor
core_features.description: 8 deterministic policy checks for bounded, safe actions.

core_features.name: Executor
core_features.description: Executing Linear writes (comments, issues) after HITL approval.

success_metrics: 穩定 build passing all Golden Traces
